The '''Plasmars''' were transparent, amoeba-like creatures native to dark world [[Y'nybeth]]. Living in an unlit environment, they absorbed any available warmth into their bodies.

==Behind the scenes==
The first and last mention of the Plasmars occurred in the [[1997]] novel ''[[Planet of Twilight]]'', where the ability of these creatures was used as a point of comparison to the condition of [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], who felt the presence of the [[The Force/Legends|Force]] with her body.

==Appearances==
*''[[Planet of Twilight]]'' {{Mo}}
